---
mode: ask
description: Register the AISOC Farm agent catalogue (run after /aisoc-boot)
---

Read [`.aisoc/skills/catalogue/SKILL.md`](../../.aisoc/skills/catalogue/SKILL.md)
and register the catalogue it defines as read-only data for the Orchestrator.
Follow it exactly, including its required readiness reply
(`Catalogue registered, 20 agents available — ready for scenario.`). This is the
canonical catalogue — do not summarise or modify it.
